name: Reasonable Cause Penalty Abatement

eligibility.description: Applies to failures regarding tax-favored accounts (IRA, HSA, 529), return preparation errors, or energy credit certifications where the taxpayer acted in good faith and had a valid reason for the non-compliance.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers and preparers can avoid penalties for reporting failures, understatements, or incorrect certifications by demonstrating that the error was due to reasonable cause and not willful neglect.
